title: viburnum sargentii f. lutescens
intro: Viburnum sargentii f. lutescens, also known as the Chinese snowball bush, is a deciduous shrub that is native to China and is a cultivar of the Sargent viburnum. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viburnum sargentii f. lutescens include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant.
